narrative_beat: Medium lateral of vintage rotary press spewing infinite P&B newspaper reels with contradictory headlines, golden gloved hand feeding page to flaming slot

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a massive vintage rotary printing press with enormous paper reels spewing out endless black-and-white newspaper pages
subject.focal_point: a masculine hand in a rich golden leather glove holding a printed page, feeding it into a small wall slot engulfed in orange flames
subject.secondary: Contradictory newspaper headlines visible on the reels in P&B. Floating embers.

environment.location: the print floor of the Ministry of Truth

composition.foreground: gloved hand and flame in rich gold, crimson and orange

lighting.key_light: warm flame light from slot plus overhead fluorescent
lighting.rim_light: gold rim on glove and page

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.secondary: flame as eraser of recorded truth

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
